title: Senior AI & Automation Engineer (Generative AI, Agentic AI, LLMs, Python, APIs, MCP)
company_focus: Data storage technologies and solutions for AI era
description:
Company Description

At Western Digital, our vision is to power global innovation
and push the boundaries of technology to make what you
thought was once impossible, possible.

At our core, Western Digital is a company of problem
solvers. People achieve extraordinary things given the right
technology. For decades, we’ve been doing just that—our
technology helped people put a man on the moon and capture
the first-ever picture of a black hole.

We offer an expansive portfolio of technologies, HDDs, and
platforms for business, creative professionals, and
consumers alike under our Western Digital®, WD®, WD_BLACK™,
and SanDisk® Professional brands.

We are a key partner to some of the largest and highest-
growth organizations in the world. From enabling systems to
make cities safer and more connected, to powering the data
centers behind many of the world’s biggest companies and
hyperscale cloud providers, to meeting the massive and ever-
growing data storage needs of the AI era, Western Digital is
fueling a brighter, smarter future.

Today’s exceptional challenges require your unique skills.
Together, we can build the future of data storage.”

Job Description

The Senior AI & Automation Engineer is a hands-on individual
contributor responsible for designing, developing, and
deploying advanced AI-driven automation solutions across the
enterprise. This role focuses on building intelligent
virtual agents, backend automation services, and scalable
integrations using modern AI platforms and frameworks.

The ideal candidate brings strong experience in
conversational AI, agentic AI systems, generative AI, and
Python-based automation, along with a solid understanding of
LLMs, prompt engineering, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and
LLMOps concepts. You will work closely with product owners,
business stakeholders, QA partners, and other engineers to
deliver high-quality AI solutions that automate workflows
and improve employee experience across IT, HR, Procurement,
and Operations.

This role is hands-on and delivery-oriented, with
opportunities to mentor others and contribute to shared
technical standards.

Key Responsibilities include:

• Design, develop, and maintain intelligent chatbots and AI
agents using platforms such as Moveworks (Agent Studio),
Glean (Agents), Microsoft Power Virtual Agents, and similar
tools. • Build and manage Python-based automation scripts,
backend services, and microservices to support AI-driven
workflows. • Implement and optimize LLM-powered solutions,
including prompt engineering, conversational design, and
contextual reasoning. • Apply agentic AI concepts, including
tool usage, multi-step reasoning, orchestration patterns,
and Model Context Protocol (MCP). • Develop REST APIs and
backend services to integrate AI solutions with enterprise
systems such as ServiceNow, Workday, Microsoft 365, and
other internal platforms. • Support workflow automation
using Power Automate and Power Apps. • Monitor,
troubleshoot, and optimize AI agent performance,
reliability, and response accuracy using analytics, logging,
and feedback loops. • Collaborate with QA testers and
automation engineers to validate AI workflows, integrations,
and end-to-end scenarios. • Participate in test automation,
regression testing, and release validation activities. •
Work within Agile/Scrum delivery models, including sprint
planning, stand-ups, backlog refinement, and retrospectives.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate
business needs into technical solutions. • Maintain
documentation for designs, configurations, deployments, and
operational procedures. • Mentor junior developers and
support engineers transitioning into AI and automation
development.

Qualifications

Required:

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering,
Information Systems, or a related field. • demonstrated
experience  in software development, automation, or AI-
related roles. • Advance hands-on experience building
conversational AI or virtual agent solutions. • Strong
proficiency in Python for automation and backend
development. • Solid understanding of NLP concepts, LLM-
based systems, prompt engineering, agentic AI, and Model
Context Protocol (MCP). • Experience integrating AI
solutions with enterprise platforms using REST APIs and
microservices. • Experience working within Agile/Scrum
development teams. • Ability to independently manage end-to-
end solution delivery.

Preferred:

• Hands-on experience with Moveworks, Glean, or similar
enterprise AI platforms. • Familiarity with ChatGPT
Enterprise or other enterprise LLM deployments. • Experience
with Power Automate, Power Apps, or low-code/no-code
platforms. • Exposure to LLMOps practices for monitoring and
optimizing AI systems in production. • Prior experience
scaling AI or automation solutions across multiple business
functions or regions.

Additional Information

Western Digital is committed to providing equal
opportunities to all applicants and employees and will not
discriminate against any applicant or employee based on
their race, color, ancestry, religion (including religious
dress and grooming standards), sex (including pregnancy,
childbirth or related medical conditions, breastfeeding or
related medical conditions), gender (including a person’s
gender identity, gender expression, and gender-related
appearance and behavior, whether or not stereotypically
associated with the person’s assigned sex at birth), age,
national origin, sexual orientation, medical condition,
marital status (including domestic partnership status),
physical disability, mental disability, medical condition,
genetic information, protected medical and family care
leave, Civil Air Patrol status, military and veteran status,
or other legally protected characteristics. We also prohibit
harassment of any individual on any of the characteristics
listed above. Our non-discrimination policy applies to all
aspects of employment. We comply with the laws and
regulations set forth in the "Know Your Rights: Workplace
Discrimination is Illegal” poster. Our pay transparency
policy is available here.

Western Digital thrives on the power and potential of
diversity. As a global company, we believe the most
effective way to embrace the diversity of our customers and
communities is to mirror it from within. We believe the
fusion of various perspectives results in the best outcomes
for our employees, our company, our customers, and the world
around us. We are committed to an inclusive environment
where every individual can thrive through a sense of
belonging, respect and contribution.

Western Digital is committed to offering opportunities to
applicants with disabilities and ensuring all candidates can
successfully navigate our careers website and our hiring
process. Please contact us at jobs.accommodations@wdc.com to
advise us of your accommodation request. In your email,
please include a description of the specific accommodation
you are requesting as well as the job title and requisition
number of the position for which you are applying.

Based on our experience, we anticipate that the application
deadline will be (3 months from posting), although we
reserve the right to close the application process sooner if
we hire an applicant for this position before the
application deadline. If we are not able to hire someone
from this role before the application deadline, we will
update this posting with a new anticipated application
deadline.

WD thrives on the power and potential of diversity. As a
global company, we believe the most effective way to embrace
the diversity of our customers and communities is to mirror
it from within. We believe the fusion of various
perspectives results in the best outcomes for our employees,
our company, our customers, and the world around us. We are
committed to an inclusive environment where every individual
can thrive through a sense of belonging, respect and
contribution.

WD is committed to offering opportunities to applicants with
disabilities and ensuring all candidates can successfully
navigate our careers website and our hiring process. Please
contact us at jobs.accommodations@wdc.com to advise us of
your accommodation request. In your email, please include a
description of the specific accommodation you are requesting
as well as the job title and requisition number of the
position for which you are applying.

Notice To Candidates: Please be aware that WD and its
subsidiaries will never request payment as a condition for
applying for a position or receiving an offer of employment.
Should you encounter any such requests, please report it
immediately to WD Ethics Helpline or email
compliance@wdc.com.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building intelligent virtual agents,
agentic AI systems, and LLM-powered solutions. The engineer
works directly on implementing prompt engineering, tool
usage, multi-step reasoning, and orchestration patterns
using generative AI technologies.
